data.description: Reference frame calculated from the perspective of Earth.
data.usage_note: Standard frame for most astrology chart calculations.

data.description: Reference frame calculated from the perspective of the Sun.
data.usage_note: Used for specialized astrological or astronomical analysis, not for standard natal interpretation.

data.description: Reference frame calculated from a specific location on Earth.
data.usage_note: Useful when observer location materially affects positions, especially for parallax-sensitive bodies such as the Moon.

data.description: Coordinate grid based on the plane of the ecliptic, using ecliptic longitude and latitude.
data.usage_note: Default grid for astrological longitude calculations and fixed-star projections.

data.description: Astronomical coordinate grid based on right ascension and declination.
data.usage_note: Useful for storing raw astronomical star data.
